reviews.comment:
Desde la costa hacia la cordillera( o viceversa) es una parada obligada para descansar y cargar combustible. Los paisajes que la rodean son absolutamente espectaculares

(Translated by Google)
From the coast to the mountains (or vice versa), it's a must-stop for a rest and refuel. The surrounding landscapes are absolutely spectacular.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTdFpYT2RBEAE
